Added Key Vault Secrets User role assignment for Function App managed identity so Key Vault references can resolve in higher environments.


SPESTG-1054 Add Key Vault secret access for Function App identity

Summary:
- Added Key Vault Secrets User role assignment for the Function App managed identity.
- This allows the Function App to resolve Key Vault references for Dataverse client ID and client secret.

Reason:
- Dev already resolves Key Vault references correctly.
- Test/UAT Function App managed identities were missing the equivalent Key Vault secret read access.
- This caused Dataverse:ClientId and Dataverse:ClientSecret Key Vault references to remain unresolved in Test/UAT.

Validation:
- Ran infra pipeline from branch.
- Test role assignment was created successfully.
- Re-ran pipeline to confirm no repeat conflict.
- Restarted Test Function App and confirmed Key Vault references still resolve.
- Verified Dev remains unaffected.


Vishal Kumar, I validated the Key Vault reference issue.

Dev was resolving correctly, but Test/UAT were missing the equivalent Key Vault Secrets User access for the Function App managed identity on the environment Key Vault.

I added the Terraform role assignment and validated it against Test. After rerun and Function App restart, the Key Vault references still resolve correctly. Dev remains unaffected.

I’ll raise the PR now for this fix.
